title: Content Safety
readOnlyNotice: Only workspace owners can edit Content Safety settings.

sections.policyHint: Master switch and sensitivity tier for this workspace
sections.statsHint: Events detected in the past 30 days
sections.customPatternsHint: Add your own regex-based rules to detect internal data
sections.recentEventsHint: Last 10 DLP events in this workspace

sensitivity.label: Sensitivity tier
sensitivity.lenientDesc: Lenient — only flags high-confidence, high-severity matches. Fewer false positives.
sensitivity.balancedDesc: Balanced — default. Flags most patterns across all severities.
sensitivity.strictDesc: Strict — flags all matches including low-confidence and low-severity patterns.

customPatterns.empty: No custom patterns. Add one to start detecting internal data.
customPatterns.name: Name

llm.modelHint: Must start with google/, anthropic/, openai/, or x-ai/
llm.guidancePromptPlaceholder: Describe what confidential or restricted content looks like for this workspace...

events.viewAllHint: Switch to the Activity tab to see the full event log.

errors.fixRegex: Fix invalid regex patterns before saving
